title: Silk Stockings
writer: Albert DeMond, Cyril Harcourt, Beatrice Van
actors: Laura La Plante, John Harron, Otis Harlan
plot: Sam and Molly Thornhill, a married couple very much in love, are nevertheless continually quarreling. On the eve of their wedding anniversary, Sam fails to notice a pair of silk stockings slipped into his pocket by a lady.
